name: Skull Reaver
descriptionTemplate: Deal [Damage:Arg1] DMG to the enemy with the lowest HP, which enjoys a 5× {STR} bonus. After Daffodil kills an enemy in any way, the Base DMG of {Skull Reaver} permanently +25% for the rest of this stage. {Leap}: Instead, deal [Damage:Arg2] DMG to the enemy with the highest HP.
